title: Sorcerer
description: A very good, light weight optimization modpack and almost only fill with optimization mods
body:
![Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/503462e526ebe9c18039552f07c9dcb9b7406766_0.webp)

Sorcerer is almost a purely a **optimization modpack** that adds only the best mods to help your game run better. **I have been testing and trying out new mods** to see if they can be useful and helpful for my game and your game run better. Also have some exta mods like Resourcify, A mod that make it easier to download resources pack, shaderpack and more. Zoomify, a mod that add a zoom like opfine.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________


[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpE1o1HZGckA4d5HpLlw5NA) - [Discord](https://discord.gg/uN9e6f5MWn)



_____________________________________________________________________________________________________
